channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Taylor Swift watches boyfriend Travis Kelce and the Chiefs beat the Bills and get back to Super Bowl
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — You could say that Taylor Swift's championship era has reached its second consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Once again, the Bills play the Chiefs down to the wire, only to come up short of the Super Bowl
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Buffalo Bills ought to be getting used to this by now. It surely doesn't make it any easier.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chiefs hold off Bills to secure shot at history in Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs have a shot at NFL history, as they took down the Buffalo Bills to win the AFC Championship for the third straight season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hurts, Barkley each rush for 3 TDs to help Eagles reach Super Bowl with 55-23 win over Commanders
item.description: Saquon Barkley dashed 60 yards for a touchdown on Philadelphia's first play and finished with 118 yards and three scores, Jalen Hurts rushed for three TDs and the Eagles soared into the Super Bowl with a 55-23 win over the Washington Commanders on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Eagles pummel Commanders, punch ticket to Super Bowl LIX with NFC Championship win
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles are back in the Super Bowl as Saquon Barkley and Jalen Hurts each score three rushing touchdowns to wallop the Washington Commanders in the NFC Championship.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Commanders get warning over penalties while trying to stop Eagles from scoring in bizarre sequence
item.description: The Washington Commanders were trying to do everything to prevent the Philadelphia Eagles from getting into the end zone in the fourth quarter.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bills cornerback Christian Benford clears concussion protocol, active for AFC title game vs Chiefs
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Buffalo Bills cornerback Christian Benford cleared the concussion protocol and was active Sunday for the AFC championship game, where he was expected to play a big role in helping to slow Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs' passing game.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Eagles' Saquon Barkley shines in 1st half of NFC title game with TD runs of 60, 4 yards
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley sprinted 60 yards for a touchdown on his first carry of the NFC championship game and the Eagles running back had a 4-yard scoring run on his second carry to roaring “MVP! MVP!” chants each time.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: South Carolina suspends DJ who controversially played song to troll LSU, Flau'jae Johnson
item.description: The University of South Carolina suspended a DJ who played a song by LSU star Flau'jae Johnson's late father after the team's win over the Tigers on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lauren Betts scores a career-high 33 points as No. 1 UCLA handles No. 8 Maryland, 82-67
item.description: COLLEGE PARK, Md. (AP) — Lauren Betts scored a career-high 33 points, Kiki Rice added 19, and No. 1 UCLA defeated No. 8 Maryland 82-67 on Sunday. The Bruins (20-0, 8-0 Big Ten) have won their last 19 games by double figures.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK STEVENS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State celebrates national championship run amid change and farewells
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — Ohio State, the first team to run the gauntlet of four playoff games on its way to the national title, celebrated with 30,000 Buckeyes fans on Sunday at Ohio Stadium.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE KRAFT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jayden Daniels auctioning off custom jacket; proceeds to benefit LAFD
item.description: Jayden Daniels may be focusing on Sunday’s NFC Championship matchup against the Philadelphia Eagles, but he doesn’t forget about where he came from. In the wake of the devastating Los Angeles area wildfires, Daniels, a San Bernardino native, is auctioning off a personalized jacket.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: ESPN's Adam Schefter under fire for using Patrick Mahomes as reference for possible NFL change
item.description: ESPN's NFL insider Adam Schefter faced ridicule for using the controversial penalty on Patrick Mahomes as a reference point for a report on possible changes coming to QB slides.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Duke's Cooper Flagg described as 'generational' player after performance in win over Wake Forest
item.description: Duke Blue Devils star Cooper Flagg had an incredible game against Wake Forest and helped his team avoid an upset on the road. Duke is undefeated in ACC play.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Matthew McConaughey touts Redskins fandom as Commanders prep for NFC title game
item.description: Actor Matthew McConaughey showed off his lifelong Washington Redskins fandom on Sunday as the Commanders got set to play in the NFC title game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Supercross riders brawl on track, dodge other bikers after collision
item.description: Tensions spilled over during 250 qualifying for the third race of the Supercross season on Saturday between Braden Spangle and Wyatt Mattson.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jayden Daniels' mom reveals why Commanders rookie remains single heading into NFC Championship
item.description: If the Commanders upset the Eagles, a girlfriend-less Jayden Daniels would become the first rookie quarterback to lead an NFL team to the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jannik Sinner beats Alexander Zverev in 3 sets for his second Australian Open title in a row
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — There's all sorts of ways beyond merely the score to measure just how dominant Jannik Sinner was while outplaying and frustrating Alexander Zverev during the 6-3, 7-6 (4), 6-3 victory Sunday that earned the 23-year-old Italian a second consecutive Australian Open champion
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Australian Open: Alexander Zverev loses a third Grand Slam final, this time to Jannik Sinner
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Alexander Zverev described himself as “quite down” and “quite emotional" after once again coming within one win of earning his first Grand Slam title.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saunders, Demin lead BYU past Cincinnati, 80-52
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Behind its best shooting half of the season, BYU outscored Cincinnati by 23 in the second half en route to 80-52 victory over the Bearcats on Saturday evening at the Marriott Center. “We have a lot of good shooters," BYU head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz drop fifth straight, losing at Memphis, 125-103
item.description: MEMPHIS (AP) - Jaren Jackson Jr. scored 28 points, Zach Edey added 19 points and four blocks and the Memphis Grizzlies won their sixth straight by beating the Utah Jazz 125-103 on Saturday night. Utah has now lost five in a row.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: UVU wins 10th straight game, beating Seattle 70-66
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - There is no slowing down the Utah Valley men's basketball team right now. Carter Welling scored a career-high 24 points, and Dominick Nelson added 16 as Utah Valley earned a hard-fought 70-66 road win over Seattle U on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 25-year-old San Diego native pursuing pro golf dreams at Farmers Invitational
item.description: The Farmer's Insurance Invitational, presented by the Advocates Professional Golf Association (APGA) Tour, is taking place on the North Course at Torrey Pines, showcasing the next generation of professional golfers and supporting minority players who dream of joining the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Avs GM MacFarland felt 'timing was right' to deal star forward Mikko Rantanen
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Facing the prospect of Mikko Rantanen becoming an unrestricted free agent after this season, Colorado general manager Chris MacFarland felt the timing was right to trade the star forward and bolster the Avalanche's roster for the future.
item.dc:creator: KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tyrese Maxey has 31 points and 9 assists in the 76ers' 109-97 victory over the Bulls
item.description: Tyrese Maxey had 31 points and nine assists, Kelly Oubre Jr. added 22 points and 12 rebounds and the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Chicago Bulls 109-97 on Saturday night for their second straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: USU improves to 18-2 after blowout win at Air Force
item.description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team continues to roll through the Mountain West Conference. The Aggies improved to 8-1 in league play, 18-2 overall, picking up an 87-58 road win over Air Force at Clune Arena.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fruita Wildcats dominate both ends of the court in rivalry showdown
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Fruita Monument High School Wildcats girls’ basketball team continued their dominant form Tuesday night, following a blowout win over Central with a convincing victory over the Palisade Bulldogs.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Kucherov scores in OT to give Lightning 4-3 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored 58 seconds into overtime and had two assists as the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers bring back Robert Saleh as defensive coordinator
item.description: (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers will fill their vacant defensive coordinator position with a familiar face. Robert Saleh will return to lead the team's defense after a tenure as the New York Jets' head coach, the 49ers announced Friday. Saleh was the 49ers' defensive coordinator from 2017-2020.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: USF Men's Tennis starts season off undefeated
item.description: The USF Bulls improved to 3-0 with victory at Stetson. The USF Men’s Tennis team earned a 5-2 win in their first road match of the spring season on Monday, Jan. 20.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Runnin' Utes crushed by #7 Houston, 70-36
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - Riding a three-game winning streak, the Runnin' Utes had gained some confidence the last couple of weeks. But Wednesday night against #7 Houston, the Utes came crashing back down to Earth. Milos Uzan scored 14 points, L.J. Cryer added 13 points and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Students receive career lessons at Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: About 30 local students got more than a chance to watch golf at Torrey Pines on Wednesday — they got valuable career insights that could shape their futures.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Mitchell High School alum playing for Tampa Bay Rays
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays are gearing up for the season. Mitchell High School alum and Tampa Bay native, Trevor Harrison, is headed to Rays camp in just a few weeks.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki, CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner elected to Baseball Hall of Fame
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Used to leading off, Ichiro Suzuki got antsy when he had to wait. Considered a no-doubt pick for baseball's Hall of Fame and possibly the second unanimous selection, he waited by the phone for the expected call Tuesday. Fifteen minutes passed without a ring.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The sweet stench of NHL hockey
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Hockey players sweat buckets, perhaps more than any other athletes in any other sport. They are wearing sweaters, after all. "It's disgusting," said Utah Hockey Club center Liam O'Brien.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 11-year-old pulls ultra rare Paul Skenes rookie card
item.description: Topps, the card manufacturer, confirmed that the Paul Skenes 1/1 Debut Patch card was in fact unpacked.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: RSL signs Brazilian goalkeeper Rafael Cabral
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake has gone into South America to find its new starting goalkeeper. RSL announced the signing of Brazilian keeper Rafael Cabral Tuesday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
